title: TanuPlus+
description: TanuPlus+ is a vanilla-friendly modpack that enhances Minecraft with performance improvements and much much more.
body:
**TanuPlus+** is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed to enhance the vanilla experience while preserving its core gameplay. This modpack introduces a balanced mix of quality-of-life improvements, aesthetic enhancements, and lightweight performance optimizations, making it perfect for both casual players and seasoned adventurers.

Key features include:

**Performance Boosts:** Essential tools like Sodium and Lithium ensure smooth gameplay, even on lower-end systems.

**Expanded Gameplay:** Adds minor gameplay tweaks and features to enrich exploration, building, and combat without overwhelming the vanilla feel.
Immersive Visuals: Subtle graphical enhancements and texture improvements for a more immersive environment.

**Compatibility & Stability:** Optimized and tested for reliable performance in both single-player and multiplayer.

Whether you're looking to build, explore, or simply enjoy a more refined Minecraft experience, TanuPlus+ is the perfect companion for your adventures.
